title: Talk to the Computer

contentBlocks.text: You can print() as many times as you like, and each one shows up on its own line.

contentBlocks.code:
print("I am learning Python!")
print("This is fun.")

contentBlocks.text: Write a print() statement that includes the word "Python" somewhere in the message. You can write anything you like around it!
Comments start with a # symbol. Python ignores anything after a #, so you can leave yourself notes without them running as code.

starterCode:
# This line is a comment - Python skips it
# Write a print() statement below that mentions Python

testCases.failureMessage: Your printed message should include the word "Python" somewhere.

hints: Use print("...") with your own sentence inside the quotes.
Make sure the word Python (capital P) is spelled correctly inside your quotes.
